revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:道摩]]




 


'''{{ill|Dōma Hōshi|lt=Reverend Dōma|ja|道摩法師|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dōma Hōshi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 道摩|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 道摩}}''' (道摩) was a [[:en:Buddhist monk|Buddhist monk]] and [[Onmyōji]] who appeared in {{ill|Kojidan|en|Kojidan|qid=Q3013995|lt=Kojidan|1=Kojidan}} 6.64<ref>[https://kokusho.nijl.ac.jp/biblio/100113418 ''Kojidan'']</ref>, {{ill|Uji_Shūi_Monogatari|en|Uji_Shūi_Monogatari|qid=Q2446713|lt=Uji Shūi Monogatari|1=Uji Shūi Monogatari}} Volume 14, Story 10, "The Miraculous Feats of Seimei and the Dog of Michinaga"<ref>[https://dl.ndl.go.jp/info:ndljp/pid/877392/134 ''Uji Shūi Monogatari'']</ref>, and {{ill|Jikkunshō|ja|十訓抄|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jikkunshō|1=Jikkinshō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11405171}} 7.21.<ref>[https://kokusho.nijl.ac.jp/biblio/100223458 ''Jikkunshō'']</ref>
== Story ==
One day, a dog cherished by {{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|en|Fujiwara no Michinaga|qid=Q433133|lt=Fujiwara no Michinaga|1=Fujiwara no Michinaga}} prevented him from entering the {{ill|Hōjō-ji|en|Hōjō-ji|qid=Q3146358|lt=Hōjō-ji|1=Hōjō-ji}} temple. Michinaga consulted {{ill|Abe no Seimei|en|Abe no Seimei|qid=Q1150151|lt=Abe no Seimei|1=Abe no Seimei}}, who divined that the dog had sensed an imminent curse. Seimei identified the culprit as none other than the monk Dōma. Upon his capture, Dōma confessed that the curse was part of a conspiracy by {{ill|Fujiwara no Akimitsu|en|Fujiwara no Akimitsu|qid=Q1397587|lt=Fujiwara no Akimitsu|1=Fujiwara no Akimitsu}}. As punishment, Dōma was exiled to his homeland in {{ill|Harima Province|en|Harima Province|qid=Q1047523|lt=Harima Province|1=Harima Province}}.

== See also ==
* [[Abe no Seimei]]
* [[:en:Da Liu Ren|Da Liu Ren]]
* [[Goryō]]
* [[Itako|Itako]]
* [[Kuji-in]]
* [[Onmyōdō]]
* {{ill|Sanpaku|en|Sanpaku|qid=Q1815087|lt=Sanpaku|1=Sanpaku}}
* [[Seimei Shrine]]
* [[Senji Ryakketsu]]
* [[Shikigami]]
* {{ill|Shinigami|en|Shinigami|qid=Q479033|lt=Shinigami|1=Shinigami}}
* [[Tengenjutsu (fortune telling)]]
* [[Ushi no toki mairi]]

=== Notes ===
{{NoteFoot|qq=}}
=== References ===
{{Reflist|qq=}}
== Further reading ==
* {{cite book |editor-last=Murakami |editor-first=Shūichi |year=1981 |title=日本陰陽道史総説 |trans-title=A Review of the History of Onmyōdō in Japan |url= |language=ja |location= |publisher=Hanawa Shobō |isbn=4827310572|qq=}}
* {{cite book |last=Endō |first=Katsumi |year=1994 |title=近世陰陽道史の研究 |trans-title=Studies in the History of Early Modern Onmyōdō |url= |language=Japanese |location= |publisher={{ill|Shin Jinbutsu Orai Sha|lt=Shin Jinbutsu Ōrai Sha|ja|新人物往来社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shin Jinbutsu Orai Sha|1=Shin Jinbutsu Ōraisha. "Rekishi Dokuhon" Henshūbu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11501312}} |isbn=4404021569|qq=}}
* {{cite book |last=Kosaka |first=Shinji |year=2004 |title=安倍晴明撰『占事略決』と陰陽道  |trans-title=Abe no Seimei's "Senji Ryakketsu" and Onmyōdō |url=http://www.kyuko.asia/book/b10889.html |language=Japanese |location= |publisher={{ill|Kyuko Shoin|lt=Kyūko Shoin|ja|汲古書院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyuko Shoin|1=Kyuko Shoin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11552315}} |isbn=9784762941672|qq=}}
* {{cite book |last=Saitō |first=Rei |year=2007 |title=王朝時代の陰陽道 |trans-title=Onmyōdō in the Dynastic Period |url= |language=Japanese |location= |publisher=Meicho Kankō Kai |isbn=978-4839003302|qq=}}
* {{cite book |last=Yamashita |first=Katsuaki |year=1996 |title=平安時代の宗教文化と陰陽道 |trans-title=Religious Culture in the Heian Period and Onmyōdō |url= |language=Japanese |location= |publisher=Iwata Shoin |isbn=4900697656|qq=}}
* {{cite book |last=Takahashi |first=Keiya |year=2000 |title=現代・陰陽師入門 |trans-title=Introduction to Modern Onmyōji |url= |language=Japanese |location= |publisher=[[Asahi Sonorama]] |isbn=4257035846|qq=}}
* {{cite book |last=Nakamura |first=Shōhachi |year=2000 |title=日本陰陽道書の研究 増補版 |trans-title=A Study of the Onmyō Books in Japan; Expanded Edition |url=http://www.kyuko.asia/book/b10888.html |language=Japanese |location= |publisher=Kyūko Shoin |isbn=4257035846|qq=}}
* {{cite book |last=Suzuki |first=Ikkei |year=2002 |title=陰陽道 呪術と鬼神の世界 |trans-title=Onmyōdō: The World of Spells and Demons |url=https://bookclub.kodansha.co.jp/product?item=0000195204 |language=Japanese |location= |publisher=[[Kodansha|Kōdansha]] |isbn=9784062582445|qq=}}
* {{cite book |editor-last=[[Seimei Shrine]] |first= |year=2002 |title=安倍晴明公 |trans-title=The Right Honorable Abe no Seimei |url=https://bookclub.kodansha.co.jp/product?item=0000180822 |language=Japanese |location= |publisher=Kōdansha |isbn=9784062109833|qq=}}
* {{cite book |last1=Hayashi |first1=Jun |last2=Koike |first2=Jun'ichi |year=2002 |title=陰陽道の講義 |trans-title=Lecture on Onmyōdō |url= |language=Japanese |location= |publisher=Sagano Shoin |isbn=4782303610|qq=}}
* {{cite book |last=Shigeta |first=Shin'ichi |year=2005 |title=平安貴族と陰陽師 |trans-title=Heian Nobles and Onmyōji |url=http://www.yoshikawa-k.co.jp/book/b34635.html |language=Japanese |location= |publisher=Yoshikawa Kōbun Kan |isbn=4642079424|qq=}}
* {{cite book |last=Hayashi |first=Jun |year=2005 |title=近世陰陽道の研究 |trans-title=A Study of Early Modern Onmyōdō |url=http://www.yoshikawa-k.co.jp/book/b32982.html |language=Japanese |location= |publisher=Yoshikawa Kōbun Kan |isbn=4642034072|qq=}}
* {{cite book |last=Shigeta |first=Shin'ichi |year=2006 |title=陰陽師 |trans-title=Onmyōji |url=http://www.chuko.co.jp/ebook/2013/07/514036.html |language=Japanese |location= |publisher=[[Chuokoron-Shinsha|Chūōkōron-Shinsha]] |isbn=4121018443|qq=}}
* {{cite book |editor-last=Murakami |editor-first=Shūichi |year=2017 |title=陰陽道叢書 1 古代 |trans-title=Onmyōdō Series 1: The Ancient Times |url= |language=Japanese |location= |publisher=Hanawa Shobō |isbn=978-4626017970|qq=}}
* {{cite book |editor-last=Murakami |editor-first=Shūichi |year=2017 |title=陰陽道叢書 2 中世 |trans-title=Onmyōdō Series 2: The Middle Ages |url= |language=Japanese |location= |publisher=Hanawa Shobō |isbn=978-4626017987|qq=}}
* {{cite book |editor-last=Murakami |editor-first=Shūichi |year=2017 |title=陰陽道叢書 3 近世 |trans-title=Onmyōdō Series 3: The Early Modern Period |url= |language=Japanese |location= |publisher=Hanawa Shobō |isbn=978-4626017994|qq=}}
* {{cite book |editor-last=Murakami |editor-first=Shūichi |year=2017 |title=陰陽道叢書 4 特論 |trans-title=Onmyōdō Series 4: The Advanced Studies |url= |language=Japanese |location= |publisher=Hanawa Shobō |isbn=978-4626018007|qq=}}
